headline: Atlas Air switches to Airbus, orders 20 A350 cargo jets

headline: NASA Starliner Mishap Puts Boeing Space Contracts And Execution Under Pressure
summary: NASA released a 311 page report criticizing Boeing's Starliner crewed flight test after classifying the incident as a Type A mishap. The report cites critical hardware defects and leadership failures, and NASA has paused further crewed Starliner flights until issues are addressed. Starliner may be limited to cargo missions while Boeing faces increased scrutiny on its space operations and contract execution. At the same time, NASA is scaling back Boeing's Artemis moon rocket contract due to...
